transcript.text:
I received a card that has no spending limits
What should I eat first?
[Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake) is a must when you're at the market]
Tzuyang!
It's really Tzuyang!
[Tzuyang makes an appearance at the Daejeon Jungang Market!]
Sweet & sour chicken?
Wow, this is a Small?
[Let's spend some money at Daejeon Jungang Market]
These will be the appetizers
[Some mandu (dumplings) for a real meal]
[This may look like her first meal...]
[What happened here at Daejeon Jungang Market?]
[This is Daejeon, city of science]
[Where is this place that's crowded early in the morning?]
Hello everyone

I'm here at Daejeon today
I received a card that has no spending limits
This is called the Ontong Daejeon, a district currency card
This will get you 10% off for small businesses here
And 13% cashback rewards from the market
You can create one even if you are not from Daejeon,
so it's a great way to save if you're visiting here
This actually has no spending limits
I received it with no limits so that I can show everyone what I can buy with this
I will go splurging today
What to eat first?
Let's get started!
[Daejeon Jungang Market] [Daejeon, Dong-gu, Jung-dong]
The Jungang Market here is really big
I came here before for a pastry festival
I ate at this Tteokboki place

[Ace Bunsik]
[Nice to see you again]
[A national snack: Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake)]
[With its friends that are best during the Winter]
1 serving of tteokboki,
I remember fried food was good
Shrimp, squid, and seaweed roll
[Freshly fried with clean oil]
[1 serving of tteokboki that looks like 2 servings]
Thank you
[Eating this during the Winter is the best!]
Tzuyang!
It's really Tzuyang!
[Gift for her]
[Thank you]
What a coincidence

[Thumbs up]
It's a chewy flour rice cake
Tastes like a market tteokboki
I love that it's not too sweet It's addicting
Fritters
They make excellent fritters
[Eye-opening]
Seaweed roll is so soft and tasty
It's handmade It's the best
[Let me tell you where to go]
Koggiri Mandu
Gyecheon Mandu is good too
Thank you
[Ace Bunsik is a must too ♡]
Let me give you some more sauce
Oh, it's okay!

[This is love from the market]
Being kind-hearted is common in markets
Fishcake skewers for winter days
[Finishing up the tteokboki]
Can I use the Ontong Daejeon card?
[Of course]
[Making her 1st transaction with the district card]
Thank you
[Recognizes Tzuyang]
-I watch you every day -Really?
Thank you
[Watching this too, right? ♡]
[Now entering the market after some snacks]
It's big here
[Market-eateries everywhere]
[Thinking about what to eat next]

Jokbal (pork feet)
Looks good
[Jeon (Korean pancakes)]
[Steamed Mandu (dumplings]
[Gookhwa bread]
Sweet & sour chicken?
I like that
Hello Can I get sweet & sour chicken?
[Gotta admit... these are the best at markets]
This is a Small?
They give you this much
Bon appetit
It's very crispy
It's delicious Sweet, but not too strong
Yum
Chicken is big and tender

I love the sauce
The portion is big
[And she eats just as much...]
This will be it for appetizers
There's a famous restaurant here
I'll be going there
I'll eat as I walk
[What will be the "famous restaurant" here?
It looks like it's been here for a long time
Bedding & interier
Hanbok (Korean traditional clothing)
They're beautiful Check it out
The Jungang Market is Daejeon's biggest market
A lot to see and a lot to eat
The restaurant is over there
It's a mandu restaurant with 70 years of tradition

Ta-da Gyecheon Restaurant
[Gyecheon Restaurant] [Daejeon Jungang Market]
Hello~!
Hello
[Welcoming her]
So skinny, but eats so much!
[Reads the menu]
Everything sounds good
What do you recommend?
Mandu soup,
Tteok mandu soup,
Fried mandu is good too
[Pretty much everything "mandu"]
1 mandu soup,
1 tteok mandu soup,
1 tteok soup,

tteok soup too?
Fried mandu, meat mandu, and kimchi mandu too?
How did you know?
[I know what you're thinking]
I know that you end up ordering everything
That might be too much food for her
She can definitely eat everything It might not be enough for her
[My bad]
[This market's representative food: Mandu with 70 years of tradition]
[Mandu soup with glass noodles]
[The 3 different soups are ready to go]
[This is a piece of cake for Tzuyang]
[Deliciously steamed big-size mandu]
[And the restaurant's best-selling item: fried mandu]
Thank you
[It's mandu party today!]

[Claps for sync]
[Me too]
-Those are North Korean mandu -Really?
Looks delicious
Bon appetit
Right, I had North Korean-styled mandu before
My grandma started selling these from the streets
Then she had a small restaurant after the Korean War
The daughters-in-laws took over
And then I took over
[Gyecheon restaurant with a lot of history...]
The soup seems like their signature menu, so I'll be trying this first
It has glass noodles I didn't expect it at all
Just like this
The soup is very refreshing
Refreshing

Not much to it, but very tasty
These are huge
It's completely filled
The outside skin is thin with not much flour
The insides are filled with tofu and meat
Lovely
Perfect hangover soup
I was told their fried mandu is the best
With some chili pepper soy sauce
This is completely filled too
Very soft outside skin
The insides are very filling
Gyecheon kimchi mandu
The mandu is very filling Not skimped out
Meat
[Chives & Meat Mandu with soy sauce]

Tteok mandu soup looks great too
A lot of rice cake pieces
With kimchi
I love tteok soup
I've visited a lot of traditional markets before
And this one has got to be the biggest one with lots of eateries
Let's cut it in half
It's falling apart!
It's ruined
Tasty
There's something about the fried mandu
[Today's mukbang is with plum juice once again]
She's a good eater And she's skinny
It will be a great dieting method if someone finds out how she can do that
Genetics
Why isn't she this big?

Meat mandu
Tasty
I'm a tteok soup killer
I eat it all by myself during the holidays
Everything else too I guess?
With some kimchi
[The real face of a Tteok Soup killer]
Now that I think about it, I came to Daejeon a lot of times
Conveyer belt sushi,
Makchang (intestine) soondae,
Maemil (buckwheat) noodles,
[Daejeon, a city filled with delicious foods]
Since I come to Daejeon a lot,
I should make this card for myself
I love how it has cashback rewards
If you spend 500,000 Won, You get back 65,000 Won

Then I can eat 10 bowls of black bean noodles once
What was the most number of mandus I've had before?
Was it 80?
I think 80 something
Oh my...
How much did she eat today?
6 bowls
[Wow... 6 bowls]
That's why people are shocked
1 last piece
It's so big
Last piece of Kimchi Mandu
[She really ate it all]
15 mandus here,
27 total with tteok soup
[A culture shock]

[You are one amazing lady]
She didn't even eat as much today She can eat more
[Round of applause]
[Are you okay?]
[The clapping is not over]
Let's go take a tour of the market now
Do you accept Ontong Market Card?
[Ontong Daejeon Card is truly the best...♡]
Do people use this a lot?
Yes Just about everyone uses this card now
It's a must for Daejeon citizens
[Do you want one?]
[Either download the app or go to Hana Bank to get started]
I had a great meal Thank you so much
[Let's look around the market now]
Hotteok (brown sugar syrup filled pancake)

[This is someone that just ate tteokboki, fishcake, fritters, fried chicken, and mandu] Looks good! Can I get 1?
[A very big piece for her]
Thank you
So good!
This is as big as my face
The outside is crispy like a chip
The inside is soft The syrup is tasty too
So good
It tastes really good!
Thank you
I'm on TV
Hello
I'm a grandma that sells Hotteok here at Jungang Market
Please come support our market
Cheap prices
This hotteok is only 1,000 Won (~$0.83 USD)

[Come support Daejeon Jungang Market]
-What's your name? -My YouTube name?
It's Tzuyang
-Ziyang? -Tzu Tzu Tzu
Tzu tzu?
-Tzuyang -Tzuayng
How many subscribers?
Like 100k?
-5 million -5 MILLION?
I don't taste any flour
It's because of the glutinous rice flour
[True happiness at a Hotteok stand ☆]
[I will come again, thank you ♡]
[What else...?]
A doll!
The tiger is cute No, the elephant is cute too!

Should I buy 1?
I can't choose
Should I adopt all 3?
-That's the most popular -This one?
I'll take this one
-Can I use the Ontong Daejeon Card? -Of course
[You're going home with me]
I feel so good shopping at the market
What next?
Butcher shop
Let's eat bbq for dinner
-Can I grab them myself? -Yes
Look at the marbling
[Great quality meats]
This, this and...
This

Pork jowl too
Should I get ribeye too?
Can you eat it all?
That won't fill me up
-Can I use this card? -Yes
[After purchasing some meat...]
Fruits?
Let's buy some
[Fresh seasonal fruits at cheap prices]
[Let's buy a bunch then!]
I got it It's okay, this is lightweight
I came to Daejeon and ate lots of good food, Bought dinner,
They give you big portions at cheap prices here
It would be great for you guys to come visit here to eat delicious food and to get some groceries
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
